title: rubus hawaiensis
intro: Rubus hawaiensis, also known as Hawaiian raspberry or ohia-lehua, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to the Hawaiian Islands. The plant has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus hawaiensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and protecting against cell damage, among others. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
